title: K-200 Airframe Acceptance Test Procedure
text:
# K-200 Airframe Acceptance Test Procedure

Document number: MD-DOC-468-G. Revision: G. Type: procedure. Author: Priya Nair. Created: 2023-06-14. Last modified: 2023-10-23. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Airframe subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1096, P-1176, P-1162, P-1166.
